name: aggregator: --cache-location <path> uses the supplied directory; default is .claude-tdd-pro/aggregator-cache/
command:
mkdir -p tree/google /tmp/agg-cache-$$ && printf 'source:
  id: g
  authoritative_publisher: G
  authoritative_url: https://g.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules: []
recommended_set: []
all_set: []
' > tree/google/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runner.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --cache --cache-location "/tmp/agg-cache-$$/c" >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -f "/tmp/agg-cache-$$/c" ] && rm -rf "/tmp/agg-cache-$$" && echo ok 1>&2
